overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a scenic coastal cliff path during golden hour. The character traverses from a stone-walled section through goat-grazing hillsides to a cliff overlook, with distant mountains and towers visible across the hazy ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with stone retaining walls

events.description: distant wooden ruin structures become visible across the water on the horizon

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the coastal trail with two swords on his back, overlooking the calm sea

entered.detail: low stone retaining wall running alongside the left edge of the path
large misty mountain rising from the water in the distance
calm blue sea stretching to the horizon with sun reflection
tall thin tower visible on the distant shoreline across the water
rocky outcrops and cliffs descending toward the water on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a serene coastal trail with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the left and open ocean on the right. The golden hour sun casts warm light across the scene as distant mountains and mysterious tower structures emerge through the haze across the water.

events.description: herd of goats comes into view grazing on the grassy hillside to the right of the path
path curves slightly right as the character walks past scattered goats

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as goats graze peacefully on the slope to the right

notable_agents.action: herd of orange-brown goats grazing on the grassy hillside and scattered rocks beside the path

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence replacing the stone wall along the left side
several goats with orange-brown coats feeding on the hillside vegetation
leafless dead tree standing on the hillside among the grass

segments.scene_description: The stone wall gives way to a rustic wooden fence as the path continues along the cliff edge. Goats graze peacefully on the grassy hillside to the right, and a dead tree trunk stands silhouetted against the ocean view. The camera follows Geralt as he walks past the animals, with the distant mountain now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with seated figure

events.description: a seated figure becomes visible near the cliff edge ahead among the goats

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a seated figure near the cliff edge while navigating around scattered goats

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing sitting on the grass near the cliff edge overlooking the water

entered.detail: human figure sitting on the grassy cliff edge facing the ocean
small coniferous tree growing on the hillside near the path

segments.scene_description: The wooden fence ends as the path opens onto a grassy cliff overlook. A seated figure rests near the edge overlooking the water, surrounded by grazing goats. Geralt continues walking past the figure and scattered animals, with the distant tower structure becoming visible again across the hazy water as the sun begins to lower toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a scenic coastal trail that evolves from a walled path into an open, grassy cliff overlook. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall, where the golden hour sun illuminates distant mountains and mysterious towers through a hazy ocean mist. As the stone wall gives way to a rustic wooden fence, the camera follows him past grazing goats and a silhouetted dead tree trunk on the hillside. The scene then expands as the fence ends, opening onto a wide overlook where a seated figure rests near the cliff's edge. Finally, the camera glides past the scattered animals and the resting figure, keeping the distant towers in view as the sun sinks lower toward the horizon.
